# EatMe Codebase Audit, Documentation & Improvement Discovery

## Objective

Perform a thorough end-to-end audit of the entire EatMe monorepo, produce comprehensive technical documentation in `/home/art/Documents/eatMe_v1/docs/agentic-docs`, and surface concrete recommendations for code quality, service architecture, product experience, and developer-experience improvements.

## Context

EatMe is a food discovery platform built as a pnpm + Turborepo monorepo with three main components:

- **`app... [truncated, 9019 chars total]

Primary pass complete. Highest risk: RLS policies missing for ~15 tables despite RLS being enabled. Deep analysis task task-1775344425-65e9 (key: review:step-02:db-rls-reconciliation) created for full migration file reconciliation. Primary task: task-1775344316-b6bb (key: review:step-01:primary). Step: 1.

RLS deep analysis: 6 findings (2 CRITICAL, 1 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM, 1 LOW). F-001: stale 005 policies bypass admin-only DELETE. F-002: is_admin() user_meta_data fallback enables privilege escalation. F-003: eat_together sessions broken for non-host members. Corrected C1: all tables have policies. Full findings in .eval-sandbox/review/findings.md. primary_task_id=task-1775344316-b6bb primary_task_key=review:step-01:primary analysis_task_id=task-1775344425-65e9 analysis_task_key=review:step-02:db-rls-reconciliation

Step 2 (DB/RLS) complete with 6 findings (2 CRITICAL, 1 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM, 1 LOW). Next: Step 3 — Web Portal & Mobile App Feature Audit. Analyze all web-portal components/routes/services and mobile screens/stores/navigation. Identify type gaps, dead code, error handling issues, and map implemented vs documented features. Material feeds web-portal-features.md, mobile-app-features.md, and improvement-recommendations.md.

Step 3: Web Portal & Mobile App Feature Audit. task_key=review:step-03:webapp-mobile, task_id=task-1775344808-3748. Analyze all web-portal components/routes/services and mobile screens/stores/navigation. Identify type gaps (expand S1 any-usage finding), dead code, error handling issues, unhandled Supabase errors, and map implemented vs documented features against docs/workflows/ specs. Material feeds web-portal-features.md, mobile-app-features.md, and improvement-recommendations.md.

Step 3 web portal + mobile app audit: 7 new findings (F-007 to F-013). 2 HIGH (pervasive any usage 80+ occurrences, unchecked Supabase errors on destructive ops), 4 MEDIUM (ilike injection, dead code, navigation type casts, Zod resolver any), 1 LOW (eat-together null crashes). primary_task_key=review:step-03:webapp-mobile, analysis_task_id=task-1775344808-3748

Step 4: Documentation Staleness Audit. Read all files in docs/, docs/workflows/, docs/todos/ and cross-reference claims against actual codebase. Flag outdated/inaccurate/superseded content. Produce material for docs-audit.md. Key suspects: supabase-integration-status.md, INTEGRATION_COMPLETE_SUMMARY.md, workflow MOB-01 through MOB-10, todos/*.md. Verify all status claims and file path references against real code.

Step 4: Documentation Staleness Audit. task_id=task-1775345125-1095, task_key=review:step-04:docs-audit, step=4. Deep analyzer must read all files in docs/, docs/workflows/, docs/todos/ and cross-reference every claim against the actual codebase. Key suspects: supabase-integration-status.md, INTEGRATION_COMPLETE_SUMMARY.md, workflow MOB-01 through MOB-10, todos/*.md. Verify all status claims and file path references. Flag outdated/inaccurate/superseded content. Produce material for docs-audit.md.

Step 4 docs audit: 23 findings (D-001–D-023). 4 HIGH (mobile status entirely wrong, security docs reference wrong metadata field, MOB-09 phantom tables, partner portal outdated). 8 MEDIUM (auth flow, deleted files, function names, TODO staleness, ERD, edge function wiring, implementation plan, export claim). 11 LOW. Also corrected F-002: migration 043 already fixed the admin escalation — downgrade to RESOLVED. primary_task_id=task-1775345125-1095 primary_task_key=review:step-04:docs-audit analysis_task_id=task-1775345125-1095 analysis_task_key=review:step-04:docs-audit

All 4 review waves done. 35 total findings: code (1 CRITICAL F-001, 1 RESOLVED F-002, 3 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM, 2 LOW, 4 suggestions) + docs (4 HIGH, 8 MEDIUM, 11 LOW). Ready for synthesis into docs/agentic-docs/.

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

- Duration: 20m 52s
- Exit code: 0
